title: Saved Object Command Deck
concept: A dense saved-object control center where temporary, browser-saved, local-directory, preview, and imported Playgrounds are first-class objects with storage-specific actions, visible command availability, and a protected live WordPress shell.
focus: storage-specific reset, reload, export, and delete consequences
flows: Preview a Gutenberg PR or branch end to end with route-specific input, validation, loading, resulting preview identity, path mutation, and save/export availability

Save an unsaved or preview Playground in browser storage with destination choice, file-copy progress, saved-row mutation, active title update, browser slug path, storage badge, and Save & Reload consequence
Save to a local directory with folder permission, different reload consequence, local-directory storage badge, and transfer history
Manage saved, local, temporary, preview, and imported Playgrounds with open, Site Manager, rename, delete confirmation, cancel, final row removal, and active fallback
Use Site Manager settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, Download as zip, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions without hiding the live WordPress shell
Run or import replacement flows through Blueprint gallery and ZIP import with warnings, completed result state, active object mutation, preview path update, and transfer history
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview route with PR number or URL
Gutenberg PR or branch route with validation and preview result
GitHub import with account connection and token persistence caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser model, replacement confirmation, and final imported state
Blueprint gallery categories and search with an honest representative subset of 43 entries
Featured Blueprint shortcuts including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Feed Reader with the Friends Plugin, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save in this browser with file-copy progress and browser-backed slug
Save to a local directory with folder permission and reconnect consequence
Saved, unsaved, local-directory, preview, and imported Playground object list
Open, manage, rename, delete confirmation, delete cancel, delete progress outcome, row removal, and fallback state
Active shell path input, refresh, Homepage, WP Admin, temporary/saved/local state, Save, and reset/reload consequences
Site Manager Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip
Files create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, save, and result state
Blueprint editor, Blueprint URL, copy, download, run, validation, replacement warning, and result state
SQLite-backed database path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with a realistic notice state
Portability actions for GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions
Transfer history that records saves, PR previews, Blueprint runs, ZIP replacement, database download, GitHub export, rename, delete, file edits, and path navigation
